# makeacompany.ai

> makeacompany.ai is the public home for "one human, infinite agents" with a waitlist for practical systems and playbooks to build a highly automated company.

This site is focused on company-building systems, automation, and operations design.
Use this file as the primary entry point for agent-friendly discovery.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://makeacompany.ai/): Main value proposition and waitlist entry.
- [Privacy Policy](https://makeacompany.ai/privacy): Data collection, processing, and retention policy.
- [Terms of Use](https://makeacompany.ai/terms): Website use terms, limitations, and legal conditions.

## Organization context

- [BimRoss](https://bimross.com): Parent company context.
- [Founder](https://grantfoster.dev): Founder profile and related public context.

## Optional

- [Root sitemap](https://makeacompany.ai/sitemap.xml): Search-engine URL map for canonical page discovery.
- [Robots policy](https://makeacompany.ai/robots.txt): Crawler access directives.
- [Full context](https://makeacompany.ai/llms-full.txt): Expanded context for agent ingestion when larger context windows are available.
